name: BAASUS Studio Video
address: Sameer Apartment, 1St. floor, Flat No. 1, Sanghvi Nagar, Above Bakers Basket, near Bank of Maharashtra, Pune, Maharashtra 411067
full_address: Sameer Apartment, 1St. floor, Flat No. 1, Sanghvi Nagar, Above Bakers Basket, near Bank of Maharashtra, Pune, Maharashtra 411067

reviews.text:
Dear Baasu,
What can we say? We are really lucky we have found you. You are an amazing photographer and wonderful person. Thank you so much for being part of our wedding and capturing these precious moments that we will never forget. We must say you have made everything so easy for us – before, during and after the wedding. You made us laugh, saw us cry (joy tears, of course :)) and captured every special moment during the wedding.
So grateful for the vivid photographs, panoramic video, and your expert guidance throughout the most important day in my son's life. You have been and will always be a great part of all our celebrations. Looking forward to many more such joyous ones.
All the best always.

So grateful for the vivid photographs, panoramic video, and your expert guidance throughout the most important day in my son's life. You have been and will always be a great part of all our celebrations. Looking forward to many more such joyous ones.

We have been customers of the studio for several decades, anything from passport photo to school ID photos to portraits. Recently, my dad passed away and I needed a photo enlarged. I contacted them Monday morning and didn't need photo till Tues afternoon.  They delivered within 3-4 hours. They were in constant communication about the frame, size, frequently sending photo for approval.  Very please with the final product.

Took some photographs for my CV and some with my sibling. They came out great! But what made the experience  wonderful was the wholesome vibe at the studio and  the niceness of the people working there. Highly recommend!!

We had a great experience at Baasu's studio. Excellent photography and studio set-up. Sir gave us the option of selecting the best shots and the photos (soft copy as well hard copy) were given to us in time.

Oh my God! What a brilliant photography... Believe me Baasu sir is one of the best photographers in Pune. This is my 4 th year to shoot my daughter's photo with Baasus studio. Prompt service,n best photography.
